description: Reviewed textbook printed-page starts recovered from TOC/body OCR or extracted body text when TOC parsing omitted right-side page numbers. These overrides only attach page_start evidence to existing toc_unit_or_chapter candidates.

evidence.printed_page_evidence: PDF page 120 footer shows printed page 114, so adjacent PDF page 119 is printed page 113.

overrides.note: TOC OCR page 6 has the chapter title but no right-side printed page number.
overrides.unit_title: 第九章 不等式与不等式组
